name: Chewy Pecan Squares
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. For the crust, combine the yellow cake mix, egg, and oil in a medium bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 9 x 13 baking pan. Bake for 20 minutes. For the filling, beat together sugar, eggs, and salt in a large bowl until well blended. Beat in corn syrup, melted butter, and vanilla. Stir in chopped pecans. Pour over the hot crust. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until brown around the edges and the center is set. Cool completely. Cut into 1-inch squares. Yield: about 3 dozen squares.
